summary: Update mode testing complete for multi-step checkout, AuthModal, AccountModal, and WooCommerce Customer API. All tests pass (39 backend, 28 frontend).

step_1_address.notes: Billing/shipping address form visible, same-as-billing checkbox works, separate shipping fields appear when unchecked

step_2_shipping.notes: 3 shipping methods visible (flat_rate, express, local_pickup), order notes field works, back/next navigation works

step_3_summary.notes: Order summary shows grand total, T&C/Privacy/Newsletter checkboxes visible, payment method selection works (online/bacs)

login_mode.notes: Email/password fields visible, first_name/last_name/confirm_password hidden in login mode

register_mode.notes: All fields visible (first_name, last_name, email, password, password2), switch between modes works

mobile_user_button.notes: Mobile user button visible on smaller screens

guest_checkout.notes: Guest can proceed to checkout without registration, checkout modal opens (not auth modal)

backend_shipping_methods.notes: GET /api/wc/shipping-methods returns 3 methods with correct structure, local_pickup is free

seed_data_creation: Tests use unique UUIDs/timestamps for session IDs and test emails. All test data uses TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested: 1) Multi-step checkout (3 steps: Address with optional separate shipping, Shipping method selection, Summary with T&C/Privacy/Newsletter checkboxes). 2) AuthModal (login/register modes with all form fields). 3) WooCommerce Customer API (register validation, login, profile, orders, logout). 4) Guest checkout works without registration. 5) Bank transfer (bacs) returns checkout_url=None. Product IDs: 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36. Test data-testids: checkout-step-address, checkout-step-shipping, checkout-step-summary, auth-modal, auth-*, account-modal, account-tab-*, user-button.
